stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a ethnic minority working class background.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the wishes of her constituents, even when that conflicts with the position of her party.
substantive: She opposes the building of the new HS2 railway between major UK cities.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said:  “Elections are important because they force me as a politician to listen and respond to the views of voters.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a ethnic minority working class background. She is from your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the wishes of her constituents, even when that conflicts with the position of her party. She opposes the building of the new HS2 railway between major UK cities. In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said:  “Elections are important because they force me as a politician to listen and respond to the views of voters.”
